arts.ttl: From Dundee to Celtic: Is a Scotland call-up the next step for Luke McCowan?
arts.sum: Could Luke McCowan receive his first Scotland call-up this month? The Celtic midfielder gives his verdict on the subject.

arts.ttl: Matt O'Riley 'truth' goes public as Celtic hero's Brighton double dose of woe underlines a season of setbacks
arts.sum: The £25million and rising signing from Celtic has endured a torrid season which started on a sour note

arts.ttl: Former Celtic player to take charge of Championship side until end of season after manager sacking
arts.sum: Thistle confirmed that Wilson, as well as Graham, would continue his role as interim head coach until the end of the season when the SPFL outfit will have a new sporting director in place to help take the next steps. But it’s former Celtic right-back Mark Wilson who has been placed alongside Graham in the dugout having been in charge of the club’s under-18s in recent seasons.

arts.ttl: Ex-referees slam damning Celtic VAR audio release
arts.sum: The Scottish FA have been criticised for their handling of a VAR decision involving Celtic.

arts.ttl: 4 clashing Celtic updates on Bernardo, McGregor, Trusty and Scales as Rodgers makes one thing abundantly clear
arts.sum: The Hoops are hoping to book their place in the last four at Hampden this weekend

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers makes one thing clear to Celtic fans about pyro after SPFL sanction
arts.sum: Rodgers made a plea to supporters in October that Celtic fans don’t need pyro to display their support for the team and the club. Celtic will see 500 less fans at Hampden Park the next time they play a Premier Sports Cup clash there, with the potential for it to be 800 if the same rule is broken again before March 2027.

arts.ttl: Willie Collum admits Celtic VAR decision vs Hibs was wrong - but Hoops got off with another incident
arts.sum: However, Hibs would beat Celtic 2-1 after VAR decided the whole ball was out of play before Johnston delivered and the strike was disallowed. “You hear the VAR at one point say that it looks like it’s gone out of play from a particular angle, and then AVAR correctly says ‘I don’t think you can be conclusive there’.

arts.ttl: SFA chief admits Celtic defender was fortunate to avoid penalty call at St Mirren
arts.sum: SFA chief admits Celtic defender Alistair Johnston was fortunate to avoid penalty call at St Mirren.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers issues four Celtic injury updates with one to miss derby against Rangers
arts.sum: But Rodgers thinks Scales will miss the Hibs game and said his cheekbone has been injured. But Celtic have now banked a full week’s training and Rodgers told reporters at his press conference on Friday that Hibs are in for a tough afternoon in Glasgow.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers urges fans to ditch pyro after Celtic hit with SPFL sanctions
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers urges fans to ditch pyro after Celtic hit with SPFL sanctions.
